pageShots.text:
ELLIE AND THE VERY LOUD HICCUP

Ellie was very quiet.

Next →

Ellie's trunk bounced!

Hold! 🐘

Tap to hold Ellie's trunk still!

The hiccups danced away.

←
The End ✨

hiccup.endingText:
✨ NEW STICKER! ✨

Giggle Hiccups

You helped Ellie calm her trunk!

The End

Hic! Ha ha!

More stories are waiting for you.

Read Again ✨
← All Stories

pageShots.text:
ELLIE AND THE FIRST FIREFLY

The sky turned soft blue.

Next →

A dance of golden sparks.

Glow! ✨

Tap the meadow to light up!

The meadow glowed goodnight.

←
The End ✨

firefly.endingText:
✨ NEW STICKER! ✨

Golden Glow

You lit up the firefly meadow!

The End

Twinkle on, little lights.

More stories are waiting for you.

Read Again ✨
← All Stories
